final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior illustration of a dark Gothic castle (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "暗黑哥特" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Victorian Gothic Revival architecture illustration, 19th-century Romantic-era castle paintings, Castlevania game environment art; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include towering vaulted ceilings as dominant architectural element
Subject: must include candelabras and iron chain decorations
Scene/backdrop: must be a castle interior with tall vaulted arches
Lighting/mood: needs a mysterious and oppressive atmosphere with heavy shadows — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must include blood-red light filtering through stained glass windows
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
